name: emobank_v1
description: Human-annotated VAD affect subset for appraisal construct-validity (A5). 300 rows sampled (seed=42) from EmoBank, filtered to >=4 words.
source: EmoBank (JULIELab/EmoBank), texts from MASC. Buechel & Hahn 2017, EACL.
citation: Buechel, S., & Hahn, U. (2017). EmoBank: Studying the Impact of Annotation Perspective and Representation Format on Dimensional Emotion Analysis. EACL 2017.
scale_mapping: EmoBank VAD on 1-5 (midpoint 3) -> CoreAffect: valence=(V-3)/2 in [-1,1], arousal=(A-1)/4 in [0,1], dominance=(D-1)/4 in [0,1].
